text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vodka and I are visiting a shrine.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I haven't been feeling so hot lately... I figure
praying at a shrine every now and then couldn't
hurt.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, the thought of relying on others
was always pretty lame to me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But in this delinquent manga I'm reading...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
When the main character took on the leader of
another school's gang, his friends went to a shrine
and prayed for his victory.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Even though they usually do their talkin' with
their fists, they got all serious and prayed for him.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It may not show in how they usually speak or act,
but they've got feelings to share too.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
When I read that... I couldn't help but get all fired
up.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Heheh... Right?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All right! Time to make the coolest prayer ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to pray for Vodka's condition to
improve.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...I think I nailed it with that prayer.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I prayed for my parents, for everyone in the
dorm... and I prayed for you too!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Whoa. I'm suddenly bursting with energy!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeahhh! I'm just itchin' to run! I've gotta kick it
into high gear!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Wait, does this energy mean... you prayed for
me?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I saw you prayin' real hard next to me...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: How about that. Guess I've gotta thank ya.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like there were good things to be gained
by coming here. Vodka's spirits are soaring high.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I decide to pray for success as Vodka's trainer.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: So this is what prayin' at a shrine's like!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Next time we come, I'm gonna really pray for you! Make sure you're prepared!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Anyway, should we head ba—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Augh? What're they doing?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I follow Vodka's line of sight to a flirty couple.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Agh! M-my nose is bleeding! And my... face is
burning?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I came here to feel better! I can't believe this is happening... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka's nosebleed goes on seemingly forever,
and she ends up tuckered out...
